title: Design Patterns
description: Explore Factory, Singleton, Observer, and Command design patterns in game systems.
learningObjectives: Implement Factory patterns to create dynamic spawns
Identify pitfalls of using global singletons in multi-threaded loops
Decouple systems using the Observer (Event/Listener) pattern

sections.title: Common Design Patterns
sections.content: Design patterns represent standard solutions to common software design problems. The Observer (event-listener) pattern decouples systems (e.g. character takes damage, triggers UI updates and health bars without character class knowing UI exists). Singletons represent global managers, but introduce global state dependencies and should be used with extreme caution.

sections.title: Decoupled Event Listeners (Observer)
